claim_boundary.interpretation: This report is an availability gate only. It is not scored validation unless required products become valid gzip/SP3 files and the frozen campaign command is actually run and reported.

classification_rule: usable_sp3 is true only for gzip responses whose decompressed content has an SP3-like header. HTML placeholders, Earthdata Login pages, redirects, directory listings, and non-SP3 gzip content are not usable products.

direct_product_probes.interpretation: HTML/login/directory content is not a gzip/SP3 precise-orbit product.
